name: gramatr
description: Your memory, preferences, and projects — carried across every AI tool you use.
tagline: Your memory and context — carried across every AI tool you use.
long_description: grāmatr℠ is the context engineering platform that follows you between AI tools. Start a project in Claude today, pick it up in ChatGPT tomorrow, finish it in Cursor next week — your preferences, decisions, and history come with you. Every prompt is pre-classified so the assistant skips routing overhead and starts working immediately. The more you use it, the better it knows you.
featured_use_cases: Resume yesterday's project from any AI tool, on any device
Save your preferences once — every assistant respects them
Pre-classified prompts mean faster, cheaper answers
Quality checks and structured execution baked into every task
One memory across Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, and VS Code
author: gramatr
